protocol_notes: Complex mixing protocol: draws GHK-Cu dose, cleans needle, pulls 27 units into syringe, inserts into BPC-157 vial, advances to 5 units then draws back to 27 units creating 5-unit air space, removes needle, mixes by plunging back and forth until air floats to top, expels 5 units of air. Injects into inner thigh and vibrates injection area for 10-20 seconds. Reports this method works well for pain reduction
